text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The public is astonished by the runaway style
Silence Suzuka employs during her debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove cautions her of the difficulties that lie
ahead, and warns me not to waste Silence
Suzuka's talent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take the warning to heart, firmly determined to
become a pillar of support for Silence Suzuka.
